channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Africa's M&A Challenges Amid Global Boom
item.description: Global mergers and acquisitions (M&A) activity has surged, with deals valued at nearly $2.9trn in the first half of 2026, a 42% increase from the previous year. However, African private equity has dec...

item.title: Governor Inuwa Yahaya Introduces Structural Reforms and Expands Gombe State Cabinet
item.description: Governor Inuwa Yahaya of Gombe State has expanded the state’s executive ministries from 18 to 23 as part of structural reforms aimed at improving service delivery. The new cabinet includes portfolios ...

item.title: Guardians of Legacy: Safina's Journey Through Her Grandmother's Home
item.description: The article delves into the emotional and cultural significance of a family home through the eyes of Safina, a young woman reflecting on her late grandmother's legacy. It captures her vivid memories o...

item.title: Escudero Calls for Spokesperson Appointment to Avoid Dual Roles in Legal Proceedings
item.description: Senator Francis Escudero has called on both the defense and prosecution teams in ongoing legal cases to appoint separate spokespersons who will not also serve as counsel. This recommendation aims to e...

item.title: Trump's Trade Disputes with Canada and the Impact of Tariffs
item.description: The article examines the ongoing trade tensions between the United States and Canada, focusing on President Donald Trump's imposition of tariffs and the resulting economic and political implications. ...

item.title: Study reveals underweight child numbers double in Gauteng's under-resourced schools
item.description: A University of Johannesburg (UJ) study has revealed that the number of underweight children in low-resource schools across Gauteng has doubled between 2020 and 2022, with researchers warning of the l...

item.title: Pakistan condemns Houthi threats to Saudi Arabia and defends maritime interests
item.description: Islamabad has strongly condemned the recent threats by Yemen's Houthi rebels against Saudi Arabia, emphasizing that any attack on Pakistani maritime interests would be considered a grave threat to nat...

item.title: David J.C. Austin, chairman of David Austin Roses, dies aged 67 after Creutzfeldt-Jakob disease
item.description: David J.C. Austin, chairman of the internationally recognised David Austin Roses company, has died at the age of 67 after suffering from Creutzfeldt-Jakob disease (CJD), a rare and fatal neurological ...

item.title: Tragedy strikes as couple dies in rapid home fire
item.description: A devastating incident occurred in Kingston, Victoria, where a residential home was engulfed in flames within minutes, resulting in the tragic deaths of a couple. The husband, who has spoken out about...

item.title: India's 'Cockroach' Protest Movement Gains Momentum Amid Police Crackdown
item.description: A significant protest movement in India, dubbed the 'Cockroach' protest due to a metaphorical reference by Chief Justice Surya Kant, has seen growing support despite government crackdowns. The movemen...

item.title: Rare natural conception of identical quadruplets celebrated in Australia
item.description: An Australian woman, Jenitar Sau Na’amoana, has given birth to four identical female twins through a naturally conceived pregnancy, described as an extremely rare occurrence. The quadruplets, named Em...

item.title: Tanzania's Government Initiatives and Legal Developments in July 2026
item.description: The article highlights key developments in Tanzania during July 2026, focusing on government actions and legal updates. The government allocated 95 million shillings to strengthen medical camps, aimin...

item.title: Neha Dhupia's Comment on Success and Women's Roles Sparks Debate
item.description: The article discusses Neha Dhupia's controversial quote about the relationship between successful men and women, which has sparked widespread debate on social media. The quote, which suggests that beh...

item.title: Argentina to sue over World Cup 2026 loss to Spain
item.description: Argentina's Football Association (AFA) is planning legal action against media outlets and social media platforms for defamation and false accusations following their 2026 World Cup final defeat to Spa...

item.title: LeBron James’ Agent Says Decision on Next Team Won’t Be Rushed
item.description: LeBron James, the NBA's all-time leading scorer, is entering free agency after a record-setting 24th season with the Los Angeles Lakers. His longtime agent, Rich Paul, has stated that the 41-year-old ...

item.title: Border Patrol Crackdown Leads to Fatal Shootings in Minneapolis
item.description: A new report reveals that Border Patrol commander Greg Bovino's aggressive immigration crackdown in Minneapolis led to fatal shootings of two civilians. Local prosecutors were warned by a Homeland Sec...

item.title: Safa extends Broos' contract amid Afcon qualifiers
item.description: The South Africa Football Association (Safa) has reportedly offered coach Hugo Broos a one-year contract extension, sparking discussions about his future. Legendary Bafana Bafana defender Mark Fish ex...

item.title: Ottawa's Housing Reforms: A Model for Urban Development
item.description: The article highlights Ottawa's significant progress in addressing housing challenges despite being a government town. In 2025, Ottawa recorded 9,524 housing starts, a 38% increase from the previous y...

item.title: Supreme Court Directs Government to Implement Namaz Site Order Near Bhojshala Complex
item.description: The Supreme Court has directed the Union and Madhya Pradesh governments to implement a July 14 order regarding the namaz site near the disputed Bhojshala-Kamal Maula mosque complex. The Muslim side al...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Highlights Pakistan's Indigenous Defense Tech Advancements at Indus RAS Expo
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif emphasized Pakistan's advancements in indigenous defense technologies during the Indus Robotics and Autonomous Systems (RAS) Expo 2026 in Islamabad. He highlighted the mi...
